title: Join with 2 AND-ed conditions where one is LIKE/ILIKE returns too many results
poc: CREATE TABLE a(id INT, a1 string, a2 string);
CREATE TABLE b(b1 string, b2 string);

SELECT *
 FROM   a,b
 WHERE  a.a1 = b.b1
 AND    a.a2 LIKE b.b2;
key_bug_features: Join with AND conditions using LIKE returns excessive results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c(id INT, c1 STRING, c2 STRING, c3 INT CHECK (c3 > 0));
CREATE TABLE d(d1 STRING, d2 STRING, d3 STRING);
SELECT * FROM c, d WHERE c.c1 = d.d1 AND c.c2 LIKE d.d2;
